series_metadata.series_description: This includes supporting information including requests for certification, correspondece, Quality Control Plans, Plant Quality Assurance Inspection reports, Verification/compliance testing reports. The SUPPLIER TEST DATA lists the components and/or test results from physical testing performed by the Producer/Supplier or from an Independent Testing Lab on this particular material. The results are reviewed by OMM to confirm compliance or noncompliance to ODOT specifications.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: on shared electronic database permanently. ; Paper: paper
